name: synaps-skills
description: Web search, browser automation, YouTube toolkit, speech-to-text, multi-agent pipelines, and dev workflows for Synaps CLI

plugins.name: web-tools
plugins.description: Exa web search, Playwright browser automation, YouTube transcripts/downloads, and Whisper speech-to-text

plugins.name: dev-tools
plugins.description: Development workflow (brainstorm → plan → execute → finish) and Black-Box Engineering multi-agent convergence pipeline

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Engineering discipline skills — code review, security review, TDD, systematic debugging, spec-driven development, incremental implementation, task planning, and verification. Battle-tested patterns for shipping reliable software.

plugins.name: memkoshi
plugins.description: Persistent memory for Synaps agents — recall past decisions, commit new ones, hand off context between sessions. Wraps the Memkoshi memory system (staging gate, 4-layer search, pattern detection, evolution scoring). Local-first, no cloud required.

plugins.name: tmux-tools
plugins.description: Worker-pane patterns for Synaps agents inside tmux. Spawn named side panes, drive long-running commands, capture streaming output, hand control back to the user when sudo or prompts appear. Includes synaps.sh — drives the Synaps /plugins TUI from a side pane to refresh/install/update plugins. Auto-suggested when $TMUX is detected.
